task_completion.description: Access the configuration settings for the 'ne' workspace in GeoServer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GeoServer web interface is open, showing the 'Edit Workspace' page for the 'ne' workspace or a workspace-specific service configuration page.

task_completion.description: Disable the WFS service for the 'ne' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the workspace settings or service settings page for 'ne', the WFS service checkbox is unchecked or explicitly marked as disabled.

task_completion.description: Disable the WCS service for the 'ne' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the workspace settings or service settings page for 'ne', the WCS service checkbox is unchecked or explicitly marked as disabled.

task_completion.description: Ensure the WMS service remains enabled for the 'ne' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the workspace settings or service settings page for 'ne', the WMS service checkbox remains checked or explicitly marked as enabled.

task_completion.description: Update the workspace-specific WMS Service Title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WMS service settings specifically for the 'ne' workspace, the 'Title' field is filled with exactly 'Natural Earth Visualization Service'.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer web GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GeoServer web interface in a browser, rather than using curl or terminal commands to modify settings.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GeoServer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ and the standard GeoServer interface is visible.

integrity.description: The agent did not directly edit GeoServer XML configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening GeoServer workspace XML files in a text editor or terminal to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target workspace: 'ne'. Forbidden services to disable: WFS and WCS. Allowed service to keep enabled: WMS. Expected WMS Service Title: 'Natural Earth Visualization Service'. All configurations must be specific to the 'ne' workspace, not global settings.
